description: Configure nginx to log all access requests to /var/log/nginx/access.log with combined format. Set up logrotate to rotate weekly, keep 4 weeks.
Write a bash script that monitors CPU usage every 5 seconds, alerts to /var/log/cpu_alerts.log when usage exceeds 80% including timestamp and percentage.
Monitor disk usage on all mounted partitions. If any exceeds 90%, list top 10 largest files and send alert to syslog.
Configure logrotate for /var/log/myapp/: rotate daily, compress rotated logs, keep 30 days, post-rotate sends HUP to the application process.
Write a script to monitor memory usage and swap. Alert via syslog when RAM usage exceeds 85% or swap exceeds 50%. Run as a systemd timer every 60 seconds.
Set up auditd to monitor all file access to /etc/passwd, /etc/shadow, and /etc/sudoers. Log to /var/log/audit/sensitive_files.log.
Create a script that monitors active network connections, logs any new connections to external IPs to /var/log/netwatch.log with timestamps.
Write a systemd service that monitors /var/log/auth.log for repeated failed SSH attempts and logs summaries to /var/log/ssh_monitor.log every 5 minutes.
Configure collectd to gather CPU, memory, disk I/O, and network metrics. Store data in RRD format under /var/lib/collectd/.
Write a script to check SSL certificate expiry for a list of domains in /etc/ssl/monitored_domains.txt. Alert 30 days before expiry via syslog.
Set up process monitoring: write a script that checks if nginx, postgresql, and redis processes are running. Restart any stopped service and log the event.
Create a log aggregation script that merges logs from /var/log/app1.log, /var/log/app2.log, and /var/log/app3.log into a single timestamped /var/log/combined.log.
Configure iptables: allow SSH (22), HTTP (80), HTTPS (443). Block all other incoming. Allow all outgoing. Persist rules after reboot.
Configure fail2ban to monitor SSH login attempts. Ban IPs after 3 failed attempts for 1 hour. Set up email notifications for bans.
Set up UFW: allow SSH from 10.0.0.0/8 only, allow HTTP/HTTPS from anywhere, rate-limit SSH connections, deny all other incoming traffic.
Harden SSH: disable root login, disable password auth, allow only key-based auth, change port to 2222, set MaxAuthTries to 3, add AllowUsers directive for 'deploy'.
Set up AIDE (Advanced Intrusion Detection Environment) to monitor /etc, /bin, /sbin, /usr/bin for file changes. Configure daily checks via cron.
Configure AppArmor profiles for nginx: restrict file access to /var/www, /var/log/nginx, and /etc/nginx only. Enforce the profile.
Write a script to audit all SUID/SGID binaries on the system. Compare against a known-good baseline in /etc/suid_baseline.txt. Alert on new entries.
Set up automated security updates: configure unattended-upgrades to install security patches automatically, email root on completion, auto-reboot at 4AM if needed.
Configure PAM to enforce password complexity: minimum 12 characters, require uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character. Lock accounts after 5 failed attempts.
Set up a chroot jail for SFTP users in the 'sftponly' group. Users should only access their home directories, no shell access.
Write a script that scans all listening ports, compares against an approved whitelist in /etc/approved_ports.txt, and alerts on any unapproved listeners.
Configure rsyslog to forward all auth and security logs to a remote syslog server at 10.0.0.50:514 over TCP with TLS encryption.
Set up a cron job to back up /etc to /backup/etc_backup.tar.gz daily at 2 AM. Handle errors and log to /var/log/backup.log.
Write a script to find all files >100MB in /var, compress with gzip, move to /archive. Log all actions to /var/log/archiver.log.
Set up rsync to sync /data/reports to /backup/reports every 6 hours via cron. Use checksums for verification, log transfer details.
Write a script to parse Apache access logs, extract top 20 IPs by request count, and generate a daily report at /var/reports/daily_access.txt.
Create an automated database backup script for PostgreSQL: pg_dump all databases, compress with gzip, keep 7 days of backups in /backup/postgres/.
Write a log rotation and cleanup script: compress logs older than 7 days, delete compressed logs older than 90 days, report freed space.
Create a script to sync /home/shared/ to an S3-compatible bucket using rclone. Run every 4 hours via cron, log sync results.
Write a script to deduplicate files in /data/uploads/ using MD5 checksums. Keep the oldest copy, symlink duplicates, log all actions.
Create a MySQL backup script: mysqldump each database separately, compress, encrypt with gpg, upload to /backup/mysql/. Rotate keeping 14 days.
Write an ETL script that reads CSV files from /data/incoming/, validates schema, transforms dates to ISO format, loads into /data/processed/.
Write a bash script to set up Docker network 'app-net', create web and db containers on that network. Web connects to db on port 5432.
Create a systemd service for a Python health check server on port 8080. Auto-restart on failure with 5-second delay.
Write a docker-compose.yml for a 3-tier app: nginx reverse proxy, Node.js app server, PostgreSQL database. Include health checks and restart policies.
Set up HAProxy as a load balancer for 3 backend servers (10.0.0.10-12:8080). Configure health checks, sticky sessions, and stats page on port 8404.
Write a script to provision a new user: create account, set up SSH keys, configure sudo access, set disk quotas, create home directory structure.
Configure Nginx as a reverse proxy: proxy_pass to localhost:3000, set up SSL with Let's Encrypt certs, add security headers, enable gzip compression.
Write a script to set up a Redis cluster with 3 master nodes and 3 replicas using Docker containers on a custom bridge network.
Create a Makefile-based deployment script: pull latest code from git, run tests, build Docker image, push to registry, rolling restart containers.
Set up Wireguard VPN server: generate keys, configure wg0.conf for 10.8.0.0/24 subnet, enable IP forwarding, set up NAT with iptables.
Write a script to configure NFS server: export /data/shared to 10.0.0.0/24 with rw access, set up appropriate permissions and firewall rules.
Configure sysctl.conf for a web server: increase max open files to 65535, tune TCP keep-alive, enable SYN flood protection, optimize network buffers.
Set up LVM: create PV from /dev/sdb, VG 'data-vg', 50GB LV 'data-lv' formatted ext4 mounted at /mnt/data.
Write a script to benchmark disk I/O using fio: test sequential read, sequential write, random read, random write. Output results to /var/reports/disk_bench.txt.
Configure tmpfs for /tmp with 2GB limit. Set up swap file of 4GB at /swapfile. Adjust vm.swappiness to 10.
Write a script to profile and optimize PostgreSQL: analyze slow queries from pg_stat_statements, suggest index creation, tune shared_buffers and work_mem.
Set up RAID 1 using mdadm with /dev/sdb and /dev/sdc. Format as ext4, mount at /mnt/raid1, configure mdadm.conf and update initramfs.
Configure transparent hugepages, tune dirty ratio/dirty_background_ratio, and set I/O scheduler to deadline for database workloads.
Write a script to analyze and clean Docker: remove dangling images, stopped containers, unused volumes, prune build cache. Report recovered space.
Write a Git post-receive hook that: runs linting, executes unit tests, builds a Docker image, deploys to staging if all checks pass.
Create a script to set up a Jenkins agent: install Java, configure SSH keys, register with Jenkins master at 10.0.0.5:8080, set up as systemd service.
Write a blue-green deployment script: check health of current (blue), deploy new version (green), run smoke tests, switch nginx upstream, rollback on failure.
Create a Ansible-like provisioning script: install packages, configure users, set up firewall rules, deploy application, all idempotent with logging.
Write a canary deployment script: route 5% of traffic to new version via nginx, monitor error rates for 10 minutes, promote or rollback.
Set up a local Docker registry with TLS, configure authentication, write a script to tag, push, and pull images with proper namespacing.
Write a script to automate SSL certificate renewal: check expiry, generate CSR, use certbot for renewal, reload nginx, send confirmation email.
Create a disaster recovery script: verify backup integrity, test restore to a temporary location, validate data checksums, report success/failure.
